zh.Branscombe, East Devon District, Devon,: 英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆
zh.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Holcombe於大約1469年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Roger Holcombe36歲，母親Margaret Avenall20歲。她和William Perry III至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1520年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Holcombe于大约1469年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Roger Holcombe36岁，母亲Margaret Avenall20岁。她和William Perry III至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1520年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holcombe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Holcomb  .

variants.name: Holcomb
meanings: English (Surrey and Sussex): habitational name from any of several places called Holcombe (Devon, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Lancashire, Oxfordshire, Somerset), from Old English hol ‘hollow’ + cumb ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Holcombe was born about 1469, in Devon, England, her father, Roger Holcombe, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Avenall, was 20. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with William Perry III. She died in 1520, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Holcombe est née environ 1469, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Roger Holcombe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Avenall, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec William Perry III. Elle est décédée en 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Holcombe um 1469 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Holcombe 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Avenall 20. Sie hatte mit William Perry III mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Holcombe è nata il circa 1469 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Roger Holcombe, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaret Avenall, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con William Perry III. Morì nel 1520, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Holcombeが約1469年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Roger Holcombeは36歳，母Margaret Avenallは20歳であった。彼女はWilliam Perry IIIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1520年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Holcombe(이)가 대략 1469년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Holcombe(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Avenall(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 William Perry III(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Holcombe nasceu aproximadamente 1469, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Holcombe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Avenall, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com William Perry III. Ela faleceu em 1520, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Holcombe родилась около 1469 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Holcombe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Avenall, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от William Perry III. Она умерла в 1520 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Holcombe nació aproximadamente 1469, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Holcombe, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Avenall, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con William Perry III. Murió en 1520, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
